2026 SUMMER INTERNSHIP APPLICATIONS NOW OPEN!
WELCOME TO THE 2026 USHG SUMMER INTERNSHIP
What is the 2026 summer internship recruitment timeline?
What is the schedule for the internship program?
Who is eligible for the summer internship program?
To be eligible for the internship program, you must be currently enrolled in or graduating in 2026 from an accredited college or university.
Are summer internships paid?
All USHG internship positions are paid. The hourly rate for all USHG interns is within the range of $20/hour.

On the application, we will provide an opportunity for you to share your top 3 preferences of restaurants or departments that you’re interested in. The final decision will be made by the USHG Team regarding which restaurant or department an intern will be assigned to.
Do you sponsor visas for the summer internship program?
Unfortunately, we will not be able to sponsor any visa for the summer internship program at this time.
I’ve applied for an internship with USHG before. Will the application process be different for me?
Through the interview process, we want to learn who you are and why you are interested in an internship with USHG.
Will USHG provide housing support for interns?

USHG partners with Educational Housing Services (EHS), a not-for-profit organization that provides safe, convenient housing services to thousands of students and interns. Those chosen for the program can log onto here, complete the form, and learn about the housing options they provide students.
Please note that EHS is not affiliated with USHG, and ultimately, any housing expenses will be at the intern’s own cost.

Interns
Intern Program
Data Engineering Intern
How long is the internship program?

Our paid internship program is 12 weeks long and takes place between June and August. In order to have an immersive experience of what it means to work at Squarespace, our interns work 40 hours per week alongside their teams.
Is the internship paid?
Our summer internship program at Squarespace is 100% paid for interns across all teams.
What are some of the perks of being an intern?
What are some projects that interns have worked on in the past?

Our interns have worked on a variety of projects that are shipped to users, including (but are not limited to!) Top-Level Domain (TLD) recommendations, the 404 page, Squarespace.com, and a Paypal integration that supports nonprofits.
What does an intern’s day-to-day work look like?

Our interns work on small teams with a strong support system. Every intern is assigned a team lead who supports them on a day-to-day basis. Interns work on real projects with real impact, ranging from team initiatives to individual projects.
Can I intern during the school year?
At this time, our internship program is only during the summer.
Internal Products

Internal Products creates and maintains rich, modern applications, services and integrations that power the growth of Squarespace. We work closely with teams across the company to define and solve complex problems.

We love our Interns.

College Interns not only gain business experience in their particular field, but also experience the famous Culture that makes our Company home to some of the country’s most sought-after internships year after year.

Wanna know one of our favorite perks? College Interns and Full-time Employees are eligible for free, unlimited space-available travel to any location where Southwest flies. All travel is subject to seat availability, so flexibility is important.

You'll have fun and enjoy your work while also getting paid! The payment amount depends on the particular internship or position and its requirements. When applicable, Interns receive an internet and housing stipend too!
2026 Internship snapshot

Our internship opportunities mirror the Southwest AirlinesTeam’s various workplace flexibility models. Some internships are fully onsite and others are virtual or hybrid models. Please read each job description to understand the Team’s expectations.
Summer Internship 2026
Technology & Revenue Management Internship Application dates:
All Other Internship Application Dates: January 7- January 21, 2026
Internship Dates: May 19 – August 7, 2026
Format: The majority of our internships are in person with workplace flexibility options available (internships in our Technology Department are fully virtual)
Housing Support: If you need help locating housing for the summer, we’ll provide a list of recommendations and connect you with other Interns in case you’d like to have a roommate.
If you currently reside in an ineligible state, you may relocate to an eligible state and be considered for an internship.

Internship qualifications
Progress toward a degree, major, or minor relevant to the internship.

May not have an undergraduate graduation date before the start of the internship unless already enrolled in a full-time graduate degree program at the time of application. Put your latest graduation date possible when you apply.

For example, a May 2026 graduation date isn't eligible for a post-graduation internship in the summer of 2026. However, if you're a May 2026 undergrad completion but a May 2027 master's program completion, then you'd use your May 2024 graduation date for eligibility.

SUMMER INTERNSHIP PROGRAM
INTERNSHIPS
Every role is a chance to strengthen our talent pipeline. Our internships provide valuable learning experiences and real opportunities to make meaingful contributions.
Summer Hospitality Internship
Internship opportunities are available at all Great Wolf lodges
All interns receive compensation at $18/hour.
How are interns compensated? Will they earn college credit?
Interns will receive $18/hour and are eligible to work 40-hours. The program is designed to meet college credit requirements.
What housing arrangements can interns access?

Interns will have access to Great Wolf’s housing portal. This portal will give interns options to find short-term housing near their lodge. They will also have opportunity to match with other interns that are looking for roommates.
All interns will be responsible for their own housing and transportation to the lodge.
